name: MUSTANG BIO, INC.
summary: PARTI OVERVIEW Mustang Bio,Inc. (Mustang, we, us, our or the Company) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on translating todays medical breakthroughs into potential cures for difficult-to-treat cancers. We aim to acquire rights to these technologies by licensing or otherwise acquiring an ownership interest in the technologies, funding their research and development and eventually either out-licensing or bringing the technologies to market.
